languages.text: "Функцию можно изменить, если ты готов бороться за иное существование. Даже если цена этому — бунт и угроза смерти".
"A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."
languages.original_text: "Функцию можно изменить, если ты готов бороться за иное существование. Даже если цена этому — бунт и угроза смерти".

traits.locale_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."
"A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."
"A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

languages.text: «Una persona puede cambiar de función si está dispuesta a luchar por una existencia diferente. Aunque el precio sea la inquietud y el riesgo de morir en el intento».
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

traits.locale_text: «Una persona puede cambiar de función si está dispuesta a luchar por una existencia diferente. Aunque el precio sea la inquietud y el riesgo de morir en el intento».

languages.text: “只要愿意为另一种生活去奋斗，一个人可以改变自己的职能。哪怕代价是动荡，甚至死亡。”
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

traits.locale_text: “只要愿意为另一种生活去奋斗，一个人可以改变自己的职能。哪怕代价是动荡，甚至死亡。”

languages.text: « Une personne peut changer sa fonction si elle est prête à se battre pour une autre existence, même au prix d'une révolte et au mépris de sa propre vie. »
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

traits.locale_text: « Une personne peut changer sa fonction si elle est prête à se battre pour une autre existence, même au prix d'une révolte et au mépris de sa propre vie. »

languages.text: "Eine Person kann ihre Funktion wechseln, wenn sie bereit ist, für eine andere Existenz zu kämpfen. Selbst wenn der Preis Unzufriedenheit und Tod sind."
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Person kann ihre Funktion wechseln, wenn sie bereit ist, für eine andere Existenz zu kämpfen. Selbst wenn der Preis Unzufriedenheit und Tod sind."

languages.text: "異なる存在のために戦う意志があれば、人はその機能を変えることができる。たとえ、その代償が不安と死のリスクであったとしても。"
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

languages.text: "İnsan, farklı bir varoluş için savaşmaya istekliyse işlevini değiştirebilir. Bunun bedeli huzursuzluk ve ölüm riski olsa bile."
languages.original_text: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."

traits.locale_text: "İnsan, farklı bir varoluş için savaşmaya istekliyse işlevini değiştirebilir. Bunun bedeli huzursuzluk ve ölüm riski olsa bile."
